---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-09-07"
---
```{r}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(ggVolcano)
library(easySCFr)
library(Seurat)

adata <- loadH5("../data/adata_PBMC_metacell.h5",
                calData = FALSE,calScale = FALSE,calFeatures = FALSE)
counts_mat <- GetAssayData(adata, slot = "counts", assay = "RNA")
adata <- SetAssayData(adata, slot = "data", new.data = counts_mat, assay = "RNA")
adata

Idents(adata) <- adata$celltype
adata@assays$RNA$counts
meta_data <- adata@meta.data
dput(levels(adata$celltype))
```

###############################Type_I
```{r}
adata_type_I_HC <- subset(adata, idents = c(
       'CD4T_c01-GATA3-HC','CD4T_c01-GATA3-TED_typeI', 
       'CD4T_c02-LEF1-HC', 'CD4T_c02-LEF1-TED_typeI',
       'CD4T_c03-ITM2A-HC','CD4T_c03-ITM2A-TED_typeI', 
       'CD4T_c04-GNLY-HC', 'CD4T_c04-GNLY-TED_typeI',
       'CD4T_c05-FOXP3-HC', 'CD4T_c05-FOXP3-TED_typeI', 
       'CD8T_c01-CMC1-GZMK-HC', 'CD8T_c01-CMC1-GZMK-TED_typeI',
       'CD8T_c02-GNLY-ITGB1 -HC', 'CD8T_c02-GNLY-ITGB1 -TED_typeI', 
       'CD8T_c03-KLRB1-SLC4A10-HC', 'CD8T_c03-KLRB1-SLC4A10-TED_typeI',
       'CD8T_c04-LEF1-CCR7-HC', 'CD8T_c04-LEF1-CCR7-TED_typeI', 
       'CD8T_c05-GNLY-KLRF1-TED_typeI', 
       'NK_c01-CD56dim-CD16hi-HC', 'NK_c01-CD56dim-CD16hi-TED_typeI',
       'NK_c02-CD56bright-CD16lo -HC','NK_c02-CD56bright-CD16lo -TED_typeI',
       'γδ T-HC', 'γδ T-TED_typeI'),
        do.clean = TRUE)

adata_type_I_HC

deg_type_I_HC <- FindMarkers(adata_type_I_HC,
                             ident.1 = c('CD4T_c01-GATA3-TED_typeI',
                                 'CD4T_c02-LEF1-TED_typeI',
                                 'CD4T_c03-ITM2A-TED_typeI',
                                 'CD4T_c04-GNLY-TED_typeI', 
                                 'CD4T_c05-FOXP3-TED_typeI',
                                 'CD8T_c01-CMC1-GZMK-TED_typeI',
                                 'CD8T_c02-GNLY-ITGB1 -TED_typeI',
                                 'CD8T_c03-KLRB1-SLC4A10-TED_typeI',
                                 'CD8T_c04-LEF1-CCR7-TED_typeI',
                                 'CD8T_c05-GNLY-KLRF1-TED_typeI',
                                 'NK_c01-CD56dim-CD16hi-TED_typeI',
                                 'NK_c02-CD56bright-CD16lo -TED_typeI',
                                 'γδ T-TED_typeI'),
                             ident.2 = c('CD4T_c01-GATA3-HC',
                                      'CD4T_c02-LEF1-HC',
                                      'CD4T_c03-ITM2A-HC',
                                      'CD4T_c04-GNLY-HC', 
                                      'CD4T_c05-FOXP3-HC',
                                      'CD8T_c01-CMC1-GZMK-HC',
                                      'CD8T_c02-GNLY-ITGB1 -HC',
                                      'CD8T_c03-KLRB1-SLC4A10-HC',
                                      'CD8T_c04-LEF1-CCR7-HC',
                                      'NK_c01-CD56dim-CD16hi-HC',
                                      'NK_c02-CD56bright-CD16lo -HC',
                                      'γδ T-HC'),
                     verbose = FALSE, test.use = 'wilcox'
                     )
deg_type_I_HC$gene_name <- rownames(deg_type_I_HC)
deg_type_I_HC

write.csv(deg_type_I_HC,file = "output/deg_type_I_HC.csv")
```

```{r volcano}
colnames(deg_type_I_HC)
volcano_type_I_HC <- add_regulate(deg_type_I_HC, 
                     log2FC_name = "avg_log2FC",
                     fdr_name = "p_val",
                     log2FC = 1, 
                     fdr = 0.05)
table(volcano_type_I_HC$regulate)

gradual_volcano(volcano_type_I_HC, 
                x = "log2FoldChange", 
                y = "padj",
                label = "gene_name", 
                label_number = 0, 
                pointSizeRange = c(0.7, 6),
                output = FALSE)
dev.copy2pdf(file = "output/gradual_volcano_type_I_HC.pdf",width = 6,height = 4)
```

```{r ORA_GSEA}
gene_annotation <- bitr(deg_type_I_HC$gene_name, 
                        fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                        toType = "ENTREZID",
                        OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db")
enrichment_data <- deg_type_I_HC %>%
  dplyr::select(SYMBOL = gene_name,
                logFC = avg_log2FC,
                p_val) %>%
  inner_join(gene_annotation,"SYMBOL") %>%
  na.omit()

#ORA_data
diff_gene <- enrichment_data%>%filter(abs(logFC)>1,p_val<0.05)
diff_gene <- diff_gene$ENTREZID
head(diff_gene)

#GSEA_data
geneList <- enrichment_data$logFC
names(geneList) = enrichment_data$ENTREZID
geneList = sort(geneList, decreasing = TRUE)
head(geneList)

##############ORA##############
#####ORA_GO#####
ego <- enrichGO(
  gene = diff_gene,
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  ont = "ALL",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  qvalueCutoff = 1,
  readable = TRUE)
dim(ego)
ego_result <- ego@result
write.csv(ego_result,file = "output/GO_result_type_I_HC.csv")

#####ORA_KEGG#####
kegg <- enrichKEGG(gene = diff_gene,
                   organism = 'hsa',
                   pvalueCutoff = 1,
                   pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                   qvalueCutoff =1)
head(kegg)
kegg <- setReadable(kegg, 'org.Hs.eg.db', 'ENTREZID')
kegg_result <- kegg@result
write.csv(kegg_result,file = "output/kegg_result_type_I_HC.csv")

##############GSEA##############
#####GO#####
set.seed(123)
gse_go <- gseGO(geneList   = geneList,
                OrgDb      = org.Hs.eg.db,
                ont        = "ALL",
                pvalueCutoff = 1,
                verbose      = FALSE)
gse_go_result <- gse_go@result
write.csv(gse_go_result,file = "output/gse_go_result_type_I_HC.csv")
gse_go_result <- gse_go_result%>%filter(pvalue < 0.05)
dim(gse_go_result)

#####KEGG#####
set.seed(123)
gse_kegg <- gseKEGG(geneList = geneList,
                   organism     = 'hsa',
                   pvalueCutoff = 1,
                   verbose      = FALSE,
                   pAdjustMethod = "BH")
head(gse_kegg)
gse_kegg <- setReadable(gse_kegg, 'org.Hs.eg.db', 'ENTREZID')
gse_kegg_result <- gse_kegg@result
write.csv(gse_kegg_result,file = "output/gse_kegg_result_type_I_HC.csv")
gse_kegg_result <- gse_kegg_result%>%filter(pvalue < 0.05)
dim(gse_kegg_result)
```

```{r Visualization of Enrichment Analysis}
library(readr)
ego_result <- read_csv("output/GO_result_type_I_HC.csv")
kegg_result <- read_csv("output/kegg_result_type_I_HC.csv")

#GO
mytheme <- theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
                 axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
                 legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
                 legend.text = element_text(size = 11))
colnames(ego_result)

str(ego_result)
ego_result$GeneRatio <- ego_result$Count/91
ego_result <- ego_result%>%arrange(pvalue)
ego_result_top15 <- ego_result[1:10,]

ego_result_top15 <- ego_result_top15%>%
                    arrange(GeneRatio)
  
  
ego_result_top15$Description <- factor(ego_result_top15$Description,
                                       levels = ego_result_top15$Description)
str(ego_result_top15)
colnames(ego_result_top15)

ggplot(data = ego_result_top15,
       aes(x = GeneRatio, y = Description)) +
       geom_point(aes(size = Count, color = pvalue))+
       scale_color_distiller(palette = "Spectral",direction = -1) +
       theme_bw() +
       mytheme
dev.copy2pdf(file = "output/GO_top10_type_I_HC(气泡图).pdf",width =6,height = 4)

#kegg
kegg_result <- kegg_result%>%
               slice_head(n = 10) %>% arrange(desc(pvalue))
ratio <- lapply(kegg_result$GeneRatio,
                function(x){as.numeric(eval(parse(text = x)))}) %>% unlist()
kegg_result$ratio <- ratio

kegg_result$Description <- factor(kegg_result$Description,
                                  levels = kegg_result$Description)

ggplot(kegg_result) +
  ggforce::geom_link(aes(x = 0,
                         y = Description,
                         xend = -log10(pvalue),
                         yend = Description,
                         alpha = after_stat(index),
                         color = -log10(pvalue),
                         linewidth = after_stat(index)),
                         n = 500,
                         show.legend = F) +
  scale_color_distiller(palette = "Spectral",direction = -1)+
  geom_point(aes(x = -log10(pvalue),y = Description),
             color = "black",
             fill = "white",size = 6,shape = 21) +
  theme_bw() +
  ylab("") + xlab("-log10 Pvalue") +
  mytheme

dev.copy2pdf(file = "output/kegg_top10_type_I_HC(流星图).pdf",width =6,height = 6)

```

###############################Type_II
```{r }
adata_type_II_HC <- subset(adata, idents = c(
       'CD4T_c01-GATA3-HC','CD4T_c01-GATA3-TED_typeII', 
       'CD4T_c02-LEF1-HC', 'CD4T_c02-LEF1-TED_typeII',
       'CD4T_c03-ITM2A-HC','CD4T_c03-ITM2A-TED_typeII', 
       'CD4T_c04-GNLY-HC', 'CD4T_c04-GNLY-TED_typeII',
       'CD4T_c05-FOXP3-HC', 'CD4T_c05-FOXP3-TED_typeII', 
       'CD8T_c01-CMC1-GZMK-HC', 'CD8T_c01-CMC1-GZMK-TED_typeII',
       'CD8T_c02-GNLY-ITGB1 -HC', 'CD8T_c02-GNLY-ITGB1 -TED_typeII', 
       'CD8T_c03-KLRB1-SLC4A10-HC', 'CD8T_c03-KLRB1-SLC4A10-TED_typeII',
       'CD8T_c04-LEF1-CCR7-HC', 'CD8T_c04-LEF1-CCR7-TED_typeII', 
       'CD8T_c05-GNLY-KLRF1-TED_typeII', 
       'NK_c01-CD56dim-CD16hi-HC', 'NK_c01-CD56dim-CD16hi-TED_typeII',
       'NK_c02-CD56bright-CD16lo -HC','NK_c02-CD56bright-CD16lo -TED_typeII',
       'γδ T-HC', 'γδ T-TED_typeII'),
        do.clean = TRUE)

adata_type_II_HC

deg_type_II_HC <- FindMarkers(adata_type_II_HC,
                     ident.1 = c('CD4T_c01-GATA3-TED_typeII',
                                 'CD4T_c02-LEF1-TED_typeII',
                                 'CD4T_c03-ITM2A-TED_typeII',
                                 'CD4T_c04-GNLY-TED_typeII', 
                                 'CD4T_c05-FOXP3-TED_typeII',
                                 'CD8T_c01-CMC1-GZMK-TED_typeII',
                                 'CD8T_c02-GNLY-ITGB1 -TED_typeII',
                                 'CD8T_c03-KLRB1-SLC4A10-TED_typeII',
                                 'CD8T_c04-LEF1-CCR7-TED_typeII',
                                 'CD8T_c05-GNLY-KLRF1-TED_typeII',
                                 'NK_c01-CD56dim-CD16hi-TED_typeII',
                                 'NK_c02-CD56bright-CD16lo -TED_typeII',
                                 'γδ T-TED_typeII'),
                             ident.2 = c('CD4T_c01-GATA3-HC',
                                      'CD4T_c02-LEF1-HC',
                                      'CD4T_c03-ITM2A-HC',
                                      'CD4T_c04-GNLY-HC', 
                                      'CD4T_c05-FOXP3-HC',
                                      'CD8T_c01-CMC1-GZMK-HC',
                                      'CD8T_c02-GNLY-ITGB1 -HC',
                                      'CD8T_c03-KLRB1-SLC4A10-HC',
                                      'CD8T_c04-LEF1-CCR7-HC',
                                      'NK_c01-CD56dim-CD16hi-HC',
                                      'NK_c02-CD56bright-CD16lo -HC',
                                      'γδ T-HC'),
                     verbose = FALSE, test.use = 'wilcox',
                     )
deg_type_II_HC$gene_name <- rownames(deg_type_II_HC)
deg_type_II_HC
write.csv(deg_type_II_HC,file = "output/deg_type_II_HC.csv")
```

```{r volcano}
colnames(deg_type_II_HC)
data_type_II_HC <- add_regulate(deg_type_II_HC, 
                     log2FC_name = "avg_log2FC",
                     fdr_name = "p_val",
                     log2FC = 1, 
                     fdr = 0.05)
table(data_type_II_HC$regulate)

gradual_volcano(data_type_II_HC, 
                x = "log2FoldChange", 
                y = "padj",
                label = "gene_name", 
                label_number = 0, 
                pointSizeRange = c(0.7, 6),
                output = FALSE)

dev.copy2pdf(file = "output/gradual_volcano_type_II_HC.pdf",width = 6,height = 4)
```

```{r ORA_GSEA}
gene_annotation <- bitr(deg_type_II_HC$gene_name, 
                        fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                        toType = "ENTREZID",
                        OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db")
enrichment_data <- deg_type_II_HC %>%
  dplyr::select(SYMBOL = gene_name,
                logFC = avg_log2FC,
                p_val) %>%
  inner_join(gene_annotation,"SYMBOL") %>%
  na.omit()

#ORA_data
diff_gene <- enrichment_data%>%filter(abs(logFC)>1,p_val<0.05)
diff_gene <- diff_gene$ENTREZID
#GSEA_data
geneList <- enrichment_data$logFC
names(geneList) = enrichment_data$ENTREZID
geneList = sort(geneList, decreasing = TRUE)
head(geneList)

##############ORA##############
#####GO#####
ego <- enrichGO(
  gene = diff_gene,
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  ont = "ALL",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  qvalueCutoff = 1,
  readable = TRUE)
dim(ego)
ego_result <- ego@result
write.csv(ego_result,file = "output/GO_result_type_II_HC.csv")

#####KEGG#####
kegg <- enrichKEGG(gene = diff_gene,
                   organism = 'hsa',
                   pvalueCutoff = 1,
                   pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                   qvalueCutoff =1)
head(kegg)

kegg <- setReadable(kegg, 'org.Hs.eg.db', 'ENTREZID')
kegg_result <- kegg@result
write.csv(kegg_result,file = "output/kegg_result_type_II_HC.csv")

##############GSEA##############
#####GO#####
set.seed(123)
gse_go <- gseGO(geneList   = geneList,
                OrgDb      = org.Hs.eg.db,
                ont        = "ALL",
                pvalueCutoff = 1,
                verbose      = FALSE)

gse_go_result <- gse_go@result
write.csv(gse_go_result,file = "output/gse_go_result_type_II_HC.csv")
gse_go_result <- gse_go_result%>%filter(pvalue < 0.05)
dim(gse_go_result)

#####KEGG#####
set.seed(123)
gse_kegg <- gseKEGG(geneList = geneList,
                   organism     = 'hsa',
                   pvalueCutoff = 1,
                   verbose      = FALSE,
                   pAdjustMethod = "BH")
head(gse_kegg)
gse_kegg <- setReadable(gse_kegg, 'org.Hs.eg.db', 'ENTREZID')

gse_kegg_result <- gse_kegg@result
write.csv(gse_kegg_result,file = "output/gse_kegg_result_type_II_HC.csv")
gse_kegg_result <- gse_kegg_result%>%filter(pvalue < 0.05)
dim(gse_kegg_result)
```

```{r Visualization of Enrichment Analysis}
library(readr)
ego_result <- read_csv("output/GO_result_type_II_HC.csv")
kegg_result <- read_csv("output/kegg_result_type_II_HC.csv")

#GO
mytheme <- theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
                 axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
                 legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
                 legend.text = element_text(size = 11))
colnames(ego_result)

str(ego_result)
ego_result$GeneRatio <- ego_result$Count/265
ego_result <- ego_result%>%arrange(pvalue)
ego_result_top15 <- ego_result[1:10,]#

ego_result_top15 <- ego_result_top15%>%
                    arrange(GeneRatio)

ego_result_top15$Description <- factor(ego_result_top15$Description,
                                       levels = ego_result_top15$Description)
str(ego_result_top15)
colnames(ego_result_top15)

ggplot(data = ego_result_top15,
       aes(x = GeneRatio, y = Description)) +
       geom_point(aes(size = Count, color = pvalue))+
       scale_color_distiller(palette = "Spectral",direction = -1) +
       theme_bw() +
       mytheme
dev.copy2pdf(file = "output/GO_top10_type_II_HC(气泡图).pdf",width =6.55,height = 3.5)

#kegg
kegg_result <- kegg_result%>%
               slice_head(n = 10) %>% arrange(desc(pvalue))
ratio <- lapply(kegg_result$GeneRatio,
                function(x){as.numeric(eval(parse(text = x)))}) %>% unlist()
kegg_result$ratio <- ratio

kegg_result$Description <- factor(kegg_result$Description,
                                  levels = kegg_result$Description)

ggplot(kegg_result) +
  ggforce::geom_link(aes(x = 0,
                         y = Description,
                         xend = -log10(pvalue),
                         yend = Description,
                         alpha = after_stat(index),
                         color = -log10(pvalue),
                         linewidth = after_stat(index)),
                         n = 500,
                         show.legend = F) +
  scale_color_distiller(palette = "Spectral",direction = -1)+
  geom_point(aes(x = -log10(pvalue),y = Description),
             color = "black",
             fill = "white",size = 6,shape = 21) +
  theme_bw() +
  ylab("") + xlab("-log10 Pvalue") +
  mytheme

dev.copy2pdf(file = "output/kegg_top10_type_II_HC(流星图).pdf",width =5.5,height = 5.9)
```


## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
